metadata.description: A woman in her 50s with olive skin and some fine lines around her eyes and forehead has an oval face with a defined jawline. Her dark, medium-length curly hair, flecked with gray, frames her face, with a slightly receding hairline. Her almond-shaped eyes are a warm hazel, set moderately apart. Her eyebrows are medium-thick and naturally arched. Her nose is straight with a slightly rounded tip. Her lips are medium-thick and well-defined. She has a few small moles on her forehead and cheek. Her features suggest a Mediterranean or Middle Eastern heritage. She looks to the left with a contemplative expression, her head slightly tilted up.
metadata.anchor: Woman with dark, gray-flecked curly hair and hazel eyes.
metadata.action_scenario: shopping at an outdoor farmer's market, holding a paper bag with vegetables, full-body shot
